items.name: theme
items.title: seam theme
items.description: shadcn-compatible Tailwind v4 tokens plus the seam depth shadow scale.

items.name: motion
items.title: seam motion tokens
items.description: Spring presets and the depth (z-axis) scale that power every seamui animation.

items.name: haptics
items.title: seam haptics
items.description: Haptic + click-audio feedback layer: HapticsProvider and the useHaptics hook every interactive control fires through.

items.name: use-copy
items.title: seam useCopy
items.description: Copy-to-clipboard hook with a self-resetting "copied" flag, shared by every seamui copy affordance.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Button built on Base UI with seam depth motion.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: Two-state button built on Base UI with seam press-depth motion.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: A debossed well of toggles; the pressed one rises as an embossed key.

items.name: toolbar
items.title: Toolbar
items.description: Raised strip of controls with one tab stop and arrow-key roving focus, built on Base UI.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: A filterable input bound to a listbox popup, built on Base UI Combobox with seam depth motion.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Text input built on Base UI, Field-aware.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Avatar built on Base UI with a seam fade-in on image load.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Accessible separator built on Base UI.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Switch built on Base UI; the thumb springs between states.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Checkbox built on Base UI; the mark pops in with a spring.

items.name: checkbox-group
items.title: Checkbox Group
items.description: Shared state for a set of seam Checkboxes, with select-all parent support, built on Base UI.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: Radio group built on Base UI; the dot pops in with a spring.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Slider built on Base UI; the thumb swells when grabbed.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Tooltip built on Base UI; the surface rises with overlay depth.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Popover built on Base UI with seam overlay-depth entrance.

items.name: preview-card
items.title: Preview Card
items.description: Preview card built on Base UI with seam overlay-depth entrance.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog built on Base UI; the surface rises with modal depth and the page dims behind it.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: Confirmation dialog built on Base UI with seam modal depth.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: Mobile bottom-sheet built on Base UI's native swipe-to-dismiss engine.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Dropdown menu built on Base UI with seam overlay-depth entrance.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Select built on Base UI with seam overlay-depth entrance.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: Right-click menu built on Base UI with seam overlay-depth entrance.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Tabs built on Base UI; a motion indicator springs to the active tab.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Accordion built on Base UI with eased height animation.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: Collapsible built on Base UI with eased height animation.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Progress bar built on Base UI with an eased fill.

items.name: meter
items.title: Meter
items.description: Meter (static measurement) built on Base UI.

items.name: number-field
items.title: Number Field
items.description: Number input with press-depth steppers, built on Base UI.

items.name: otp-field
items.title: OTP Field
items.description: One-time-code input built on Base UI.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: Custom scrollbar area built on Base UI.

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast
items.description: Toast notifications built on Base UI with a bouncy seam entrance.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Auto-growing multiline text field styled as a seam entry well.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: A raised surface key with header, content, and footer sections.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Miniature embossed status chip with seam depth variants.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Loading placeholder well with an opacity-only pulse.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty State
items.description: Zero-data placeholder — a debossed well with an embossed icon key, copy, and actions.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Loading indicator with a reduced-motion opacity fallback.

items.name: kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: Keyboard shortcut rendered as a tiny embossed keycap.

items.name: message
items.title: Message
items.description: Chat message row — user as an embossed key, assistant as flat prose.

items.name: conversation
items.title: Conversation
items.description: Stick-to-bottom chat viewport with a floating scroll-to-latest key.

items.name: composer
items.title: Composer
items.description: The prompt input — a debossed well with send/stop, attachments, and Enter-to-send.

items.name: response
items.title: Response
items.description: Streaming-safe markdown renderer that hardens incomplete blocks.

items.name: code-block
items.title: Code Block
items.description: Highlighted code in a debossed well, with a copy key.

items.name: tool
items.title: Tool
items.description: Agentic step disclosure — status chip, collapsible result. Includes Reasoning.

items.name: typing-indicator
items.title: Typing Indicator
items.description: Pre-first-token dots; bounce becomes an opacity pulse under reduced motion.

items.name: suggestions
items.title: Suggestions
items.description: Scrollable row of prompt chips with a staggered entrance.

items.name: sources
items.title: Sources
items.description: Grounded-answer sources list and hoverable inline citations.

items.name: chat-timeline
items.title: Chat Timeline
items.description: Grouped, timestamped conversation history with sticky day headers.

items.name: media-toggle
items.title: Media Toggle
items.description: Round mic/camera/screen-share key; muted goes destructive-tinted.

items.name: voice-visualizer
items.title: Voice Visualizer
items.description: Agent-state dots driven by audio level, with an owned useAudioLevel hook.

items.name: voice-avatar
items.title: Voice Avatar
items.description: Avatar with a speaking halo that breathes with audio level.

items.name: device-selector
items.title: Device Selector
items.description: Mic/camera/output picker on DropdownMenu, with an owned useMediaDevices hook.

items.name: agent-status
items.title: Agent Status
items.description: The canonical agent-state indicator — waiting/working/ready/done/error, as dot or chip.

items.name: branch-chip
items.title: Branch Chip
items.description: Branch/worktree pill — press to copy, with ahead/behind counts and PR state.

items.name: context-meter
items.title: Context Meter
items.description: Context-window usage ring on Base UI Meter; turns destructive past a critical threshold.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Collapsible app sidebar — a recessed well the active session rises out of; ⌘B rail collapse.

items.name: command-palette
items.title: Command Palette
items.description: ⌘K launcher — Base UI Autocomplete rendered inline and always-open inside a Dialog.

items.name: model-picker
items.title: Model Picker
items.description: Provider-grouped model select with connection dots — a recipe over Select for composer footers.

items.name: mode-selector
items.title: Mode Selector
items.description: Agent/plan/ask segmented control — a compact recipe over Toggle Group for composer footers.

items.name: dictation-card
items.title: Dictation Card
items.description: Waveform + live editable transcript + confirm/cancel — dictation as a review step in the composer well.

items.name: permission-card
items.title: Permission Card
items.description: Inline approval — allow once / allow for session / deny, settling into a receipt.

items.name: plan-card
items.title: Plan Card
items.description: Plan approval with a step checklist, plus the checkpoint-restore strip for the timeline.

items.name: terminal-block
items.title: Terminal Block
items.description: Command output in a debossed well with a live agent-status chip and copy key.

items.name: checks-panel
items.title: Checks Panel
items.description: CI checks list with expandable failure logs and a merge button that names its method.

items.name: connector-card
items.title: Connector Card
items.description: Integration card with OAuth states, per-conversation enable switch, and a discovered-tools disclosure.

items.name: session-item
items.title: Session Item
items.description: Rich session row for the sidebar, plus the hover-card layout with status, branch, and quick actions.

items.name: workbench-header
items.title: Workbench Header
items.description: The bar over the thread — session identity left, telemetry and actions right.

items.name: voice-control-bar
items.title: Voice Control Bar
items.description: Floating call pill that morphs open into a chat composer; composes the voice suite.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Styled semantic table primitives on a raised seam surface.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: TanStack Table engine: filtering, pagination, sorting, selection, inline edit, and row actions.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Accessible label for form controls.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: Base UI Field wrappers — label, description, and an error that shakes in, with the error haptic.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: Native form with consolidated error handling built on Base UI; pairs with Field.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Static inline callout for persistent state — the debossed counterpart to toast.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Navigation hierarchy showing the current page's location.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Page links in a debossed well; the active page is an embossed key that springs between links.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.title: Aspect Ratio
items.description: Constrains content to a fixed width-to-height ratio.
